articles.title: XRP Breaks Key Barrier, Surges Past 100-Day SMA And $2.7 Resistance
articles.description: XRP has finally shattered a critical resistance level, surging past $2.7 and breaking above the 100-day Simple Moving Average (SMA). This bullish move signals renewed strength in the market, with buyers stepping in to drive momentum higher. After weeks of sideways trading, XRP’s breakout could be the catalyst for further gains, but can the bulls sustain this rally? With technical indicators...

articles.title: NYSE proposes rule change to allow ETH staking on Grayscale’s spot Ether ETFs
articles.description: Asset manager Grayscale plans to introduce staking to its spot Ether ETFs but says it will not guarantee or promote any specific level of returns to investors.
